description: User clicks the primary 'Start Free' call-to-action button on the home page hero section
User clicks a plan CTA button (Start Free or Get Pro) on a pricing card
User switches between monthly and yearly billing on the pricing page
User clicks on a platform app card (Web App, iOS, Chrome Extension, Desktop, API, Raycast)
User clicks the Register button in the site header
User clicks the Login button in the site header
User clicks the 'Setup Guide' link on the self-hosted section of the pricing page
User clicks the 'Follow on X' button on the changelog page
